sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented for this puzzle game

special_mechanics.name: Stack Swapping
special_mechanics.description: Mario controls the four vertical stacks of blocks/monsters by swapping the positions of any two adjacent stacks. This is the core gameplay mechanic, not a movement mechanic.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Yoshi is a falling-block puzzle game, not a platformer. No character movement physics parameters are documented in available sources. Mario operates below the playing field and only performs stack-swapping actions, not traditional movement. No jump physics, gravity, or speed values are available.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Yoshi NES article)
